mechanisms.description: Bot user tokens start with xoxb. Used for bot actions in workspaces.
User tokens for acting on behalf of a user.
Simple URL for posting messages to a channel

authentication.notes: Tokens cannot be sent as query parameters. Must be in Authorization header or POST body parameter named 'token'.
authentication.content_type_requirement: Must set Content-type header to application/json explicitly.

rate_limits.system: Per-method tiered rate limiting (per workspace per token)

methods: users.profile.set: 10/min per profile, 30 profiles/min per token

rate_limits.notes: May 2025: Non-Marketplace commercially distributed apps face stricter limits (1 req/min for conversations.history/replies, max 15 objects per response). Marketplace apps unaffected.

core_endpoints.description: Get channel history (Tier 1 — restricted for non-marketplace)
Get thread replies (Tier 1 — restricted for non-marketplace)

error_dictionary.solution: Re-authorize the app with the workspace
Check token format and validity. Token must start with xoxb- (bot) or xoxp- (user)

error_dictionary.description: Token has been revoked by user or workspace admin
error_dictionary.solution: Notify user to re-install the app

error_dictionary.description: Bot user is not a member of the channel
error_dictionary.solution: Invite bot to the channel using conversations.invite
Check channel status before posting. Notify user if channel is archived
Respect Retry-After header value (seconds). Implement exponential backoff. For Tier 1 methods: max 1 req/min for non-marketplace apps
Implement adaptive rate limiting. Monitor X-RateLimit-* headers

error_dictionary.description: Bot user tried to access a method not available to bots
error_dictionary.solution: Use user token instead of bot token for the specific method

community_constraints.issue: May 2025 rate limit changes for non-Marketplace apps
community_constraints.detail: conversations.history and conversations.replies limited to 1 req/min with max 15 objects for non-marketplace commercially distributed apps created after May 29, 2025
community_constraints.workaround: Submit app for Slack Marketplace approval. Or distribute as 'internal customer-built app' which retains 50+ req/min. Or minimize use of these methods.

community_constraints.issue: Content-Type header must be explicitly set to application/json
community_constraints.detail: Many developers miss this requirement and get unexpected errors. Slack won't interpret POST body as JSON without explicit header
community_constraints.workaround: Always include 'Content-Type: application/json' header. Never send token as query parameter or in POST JSON body.

community_constraints.issue: Bot tokens limited to subset of methods
community_constraints.detail: Bot tokens return 'user_is_bot' error for methods not available to bots. This catches developers off guard.
community_constraints.workaround: Check method availability for bot tokens before implementing. Use user token (xoxp-) for methods that require user context.

use_cases: Send automated notifications from CRM events to Slack channels
Create Slack tickets from CRM deal updates
Sync Slack user profiles with CRM contact data
Log sales activities from Slack messages to CRM
